cloudMode.title: Cloud Mode
cloudMode.description: Connect to printers via Bambu Labs cloud instead of LAN

cloudEmail.title: Bambu Labs Email
cloudEmail.description: Your Bambu Labs account email (cloud mode only)

cloudPassword.title: Bambu Labs Password
cloudPassword.description: Your Bambu Labs account password (cloud mode only)

cloudToken.title: Auth Token
cloudToken.description: Bambu Labs auth token (alternative to email/password, e.g. if 2FA is enabled)

printers.title: Printers
printers.description: In cloud mode without printers listed, all printers on your account are auto-discovered

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: Required for LAN mode. Also needed in cloud mode for camera streaming.

accessCode.title: Access Code
accessCode.description: Required for LAN mode. Also needed in cloud mode for camera streaming.

enableCamera.title: Enable Camera
enableCamera.description: Stream the printer camera to HomeKit. Requires ffmpeg installed on the system and LAN access to the printer.

cameraType.title: Camera Type
cameraType.description: RTSP for X1/X1C/X1E/P2S/H2 series. JPEG for A1/A1 Mini/P1P/P1S.

condition.functionBody: try { return arrayItem.enableCamera === true; } catch(e) { return false; }

ffmpegPath.title: FFmpeg Path
ffmpegPath.description: Custom path to ffmpeg binary (defaults to 'ffmpeg' on PATH)

condition.functionBody: try { return arrayItem.enableCamera === true; } catch(e) { return false; }
